title: fix: keep API publishable keys in API section
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Sorting the keychain
gist.blurb: Fixed a dashboard bug where plain publishable API keys were getting mixed up with App keys. Everything is back in its right place, nice and tidy.
gist.summary: Fixed a dashboard sorting issue to ensure plain publishable API keys remain in the API section rather than being misclassified as App keys.
gist.impact: Users will now see their API keys correctly categorized in the dashboard, with app-specific controls hidden for standard keys.
gist.visual_concept: Organizing keys. The bee mascot and the monitor robot sorting physical glowing keys on a pegboard in a cozy workshop, representing the dashboard UI fix.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, organizing glowing golden keys on a wooden pegboard inside a warm workshop. A chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head helps by holding a small box of keys. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, organizing glowing golden keys on a wooden pegboard inside a warm workshop. A chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head helps by holding a small box of keys. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
